sentence.sentence_en: He listened to soft music whilst reading the book.

sentence.sentence_en: He faced the terrible misfortune with great personal courage.

sentence.sentence_en: You need to loosen the tight metal bolt first.

sentence.sentence_en: The police suspected his direct criminal involvement in crime.

sentence.sentence_en: The judge decided to summon the key witness tomorrow.

sentence.sentence_pl: Stary mnich żył cichym, samotnym życiem z dala od ludzi.

sentence.sentence_en: They spent a week camping deep in Alaskan wilderness.
sentence.sentence_pl: Spędzili tydzień obozując głęboko w dziczy Alaski.

sentence.sentence_en: The clock's internal gears mechanism is extremely delicate.
sentence.sentence_pl: Wewnętrzny mechanizm kół zębatych zegara jest niezwykle delikatny.

sentence.sentence_pl: Historyczna katedra ma ogromną złotą kopułę na dachu.

sentence.sentence_en: She added a few fresh sage leaves to the butter sauce to enhance the flavor of the pasta.

sentence.sentence_pl: Upiekła dziś trochę pysznych ciasteczek z kawałkami czekolady.
